suite.name: Tests
User Makes One Way Call

Get Device By Type

Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.arg: WARNING: No SIPServer available - voice tests will be skipped

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: The SIP server is running and operational
kw.doc: Verify SIP server (Kamailio) is running.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Voice test environment initialized: ${phone_count} phones available
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Initialize voice test environment with SIP phones.

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V1: LAN Phone Calls WAN Phone (NAT Outbound)
test.doc: LAN phone calls WAN phone - tests NAT outbound traversal Requires: 2 SIP phones, SIPServer
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Dictionary '${phones}' has no key '0'.

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V3: WAN Phone Calls LAN Phone (NAT Inbound)
test.doc: WAN phone calls LAN phone - tests NAT inbound traversal Requires: 2 SIP phones, SIPServer
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Dictionary '${phones}' has no key '0'.

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V4: WAN Phone Calls WAN Phone 2 (Direct WAN)
test.doc: WAN phone calls another WAN phone - direct WAN communication Requires: 3 SIP phones, SIPServer
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Dictionary '${phones}' has no key '0'.

test.name: UC-12348-3a: Invalid Phone Number
test.doc: Extension: Caller dials unregistered phone number Requires: 2 SIP phones (caller only used, but setup needs 2)
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Dictionary '${phones}' has no key '0'.

test.name: UC-12348-8a: Callee Is Busy
test.doc: Extension: Callee is already in an active call Requires: 2 SIP phones
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Dictionary '${phones}' has no key '0'.

test.name: UC-12348-11a: Callee Does Not Answer (Timeout)
test.doc: Extension: Callee does not answer within timeout period Requires: 2 SIP phones
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Dictionary '${phones}' has no key '0'.

test.name: UC-12348-11b: Callee Rejects The Call
test.doc: Extension: Callee actively rejects the incoming call Requires: 2 SIP phones
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Dictionary '${phones}' has no key '0'.

kw.name: Teardown Voice Test Environment
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

branch.msg: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$LAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$LAN_PHONE' not found.
branch.status: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$LAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$LAN_PHONE' not found.

if.status: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$LAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$LAN_PHONE' not found.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

branch.msg: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE' not found.
branch.status: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE' not found.

if.status: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE' not found.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

branch.msg: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE2 is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE2' not found.
branch.status: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE2 is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE2' not found.

if.status: Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE2 is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE2' not found.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up voice test environment. Safely hangs up any active calls on available phones.
kw.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$LAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$LAN_PHONE' not found.
2) Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE' not found.
3) Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE2 is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE2' not found.

suite.doc:
UC-12348: User Makes a One-Way Call As a user, I want to make a voice call from one SIP phone to another so that I can establish voice communication.
Corresponds to tests/features/UC-12348 User makes a one-way call.feature
Device Requirements: - Most tests require 2 SIP phones minimum - UC-12348-Main-V4 requires 3 SIP phones - All phone numbers are obtained from device object properties
suite.status:
Suite setup failed: Dictionary '${phones}' has no key '0'.
Also suite teardown failed: Several failures occurred:
1) Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$LAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$LAN_PHONE' not found.
2) Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE' not found.
3) Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$WAN_PHONE2 is not None' failed: Variable '$WAN_PHONE2' not found.

suite.doc:
Boardfarm BDD Robot Framework Test Suites
This test suite contains Robot Framework implementations of BDD scenarios that correspond to the system use cases defined in requirements/.
All tests use scenario-aligned keyword libraries that mirror the pytest-bdd step definitions, providing consistent behavior across both frameworks.
Test Suites: - hello.robot: Basic smoke tests - remote_cpe_reboot.robot: UC-12347 Remote CPE Reboot - user_makes_one_way_call.robot: UC-12348 Voice Call Tests - acs_gui_device_management.robot: UC-ACS-GUI-01 GUI Management - device_class_initialization.robot: Device Class Tests
